description: Field gamma-radiography exposure-control scene: gamma projector on the ground, guide tube to a collimated exposure head on a pipe girth weld (film cassette behind), collimated beam angled into the ground, radiographer crouched at the crank behind a masonry block wall with the drive cable run out at FULL length, rope boundary with trefoil placards and a survey meter at the far radius. crbPulse is a looping ambient dose-ripple that dies at the rope plus a cable shimmer. Serves rt1-5-1 (FULL CABLE // BEHIND WALL) and rt2-6-1 (FULL CABLE // ROPE POSTED): rt2-6-1 maps crbScene = everything through crbCableLbl, then crbRope/crbRopeKit ~2.5s, crbPulse ambient.
